examples: The team's products easily outsell those of other American baseball teams overseas.
We outsell them by two to one.
Collectively, those phones now outsell the iPhone.
No-name rivals, such as Sterilite, took the business, and now Sterilite's 70-liter clear totes outsell Rubbermaid's.
Action movies always outsell foreign art films in which people just sit around and talk.
